otterAndFriendsRune.title: Otter and Friends
OTTER_AND_FRIENDS_RUNE.title: Otter and Friends
otterAndFriendsRune.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Believe in You[/gold] to your hand, then cycle a team buff: draw [blue]2[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy, or gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
OTTER_AND_FRIENDS_RUNE.description: At the start of your turn, add [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Believe in You[/gold] to your hand, then cycle a team buff: draw [blue]2[/blue], gain [blue]1[/blue] Energy, or gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold].
otterAndFriendsRune.flavor: Sponsor item: Friends help in order.
OTTER_AND_FRIENDS_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Friends help in order.
regretRune.title: Fate's Echo
REGRET_RUNE.title: Fate's Echo
regretRune.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. When you die, revive at [blue]30%[/blue] HP, draw until your hand is full, make all cards cost [blue]0[/blue] this turn, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies, and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold]. Can revive up to [blue]7[/blue] times per run.
REGRET_RUNE.description: At the start of combat, gain [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Dexterity[/gold]. When you die, revive at [blue]30%[/blue] HP, draw until your hand is full, make all cards cost [blue]0[/blue] this turn, apply [blue]2[/blue] [gold]Weak[/gold] and [gold]Vulnerable[/gold] to all enemies, and gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Intangible[/gold]. Can revive up to [blue]7[/blue] times per run.
regretRune.flavor: Sponsor item: Fate sometimes takes a step back, but it keeps the ledger.
REGRET_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Fate sometimes takes a step back, but it keeps the ledger.
starlightSparkleRune.title: Starlight Sparkle
STARLIGHT_SPARKLE_RUNE.title: Starlight Sparkle
starlightSparkleRune.description: Gain [gold]White Star[/gold], [gold]Black Star[/gold], and [gold]Gold Star[/gold]. At the start of Elite combats, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold], plus [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold].
STARLIGHT_SPARKLE_RUNE.description: Gain [gold]White Star[/gold], [gold]Black Star[/gold], and [gold]Gold Star[/gold]. At the start of Elite combats, gain [blue]1[/blue] [gold]Strength[/gold] and [gold]Dexterity[/gold], plus [blue]3[/blue] [gold]Plating[/gold] and [gold]Regen[/gold].
starlightSparkleRune.flavor: Sponsor item: When starlight gleams, victory looks your way twice.
STARLIGHT_SPARKLE_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: When starlight gleams, victory looks your way twice.
cosplayRune.title: COSPLAY
COSPLAY_RUNE.title: COSPLAY
cosplayRune.description: On pickup, add [gold]Feel No Pain[/gold], [gold]Juggernaut[/gold], [gold]Stoke[/gold], and [gold]Battle Trance[/gold] with [gold]Innate[/gold] to your deck. Gain [gold]Lantern[/gold].
COSPLAY_RUNE.description: On pickup, add [gold]Feel No Pain[/gold], [gold]Juggernaut[/gold], [gold]Stoke[/gold], and [gold]Battle Trance[/gold] with [gold]Innate[/gold] to your deck. Gain [gold]Lantern[/gold].
cosplayRune.flavor: Sponsor item: Wear someone else's moves, and fate loses track of you.
COSPLAY_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: Wear someone else's moves, and fate loses track of you.
goldStarRelic.title: Gold Star
GOLD_STAR_RELIC.title: Gold Star
goldStarRelic.description: When an Elite enemy is defeated, drop [blue]1[/blue] extra normal enemy reward.
GOLD_STAR_RELIC.description: When an Elite enemy is defeated, drop [blue]1[/blue] extra normal enemy reward.
goldStarRelic.flavor: Sponsor item: A bright mark of victory, pointing toward one more prize.
GOLD_STAR_RELIC.flavor: Sponsor item: A bright mark of victory, pointing toward one more prize.
evolutionForge.title: Evolution Forger
EVOLUTION_FORGE.title: Evolution Forger
evolutionForge.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Evolution[/gold].
EVOLUTION_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it with [gold]Evolution[/gold].
evolutionForge.flavor: Sponsor item: The forge does not finish the card; it teaches the card to keep changing.
EVOLUTION_FORGE.flavor: Sponsor item: The forge does not finish the card; it teaches the card to keep changing.
mysticForge.title: Mystic Forger
MYSTIC_FORGE.title: Mystic Forger
mysticForge.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it based on card type: Attacks gain [gold]Instinct[/gold], Skills gain [gold]Imbued[/gold], and Powers gain [gold]Sown[/gold].
MYSTIC_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it based on card type: Attacks gain [gold]Instinct[/gold], Skills gain [gold]Imbued[/gold], and Powers gain [gold]Sown[/gold].
mysticForge.flavor: Sponsor item: The sigils choose their shape after reading the card.
MYSTIC_FORGE.flavor: Sponsor item: The sigils choose their shape after reading the card.
enchantmentForge.title: Enchantment Forger
ENCHANTMENT_FORGE.title: Enchantment Forger
enchantmentForge.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it based on card type: Attacks gain [gold]Sharp[/gold] [blue]3[/blue], Skills gain [gold]Nimble[/gold] [blue]3[/blue], and Powers gain [gold]Swift[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
ENCHANTMENT_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck and enchant it based on card type: Attacks gain [gold]Sharp[/gold] [blue]3[/blue], Skills gain [gold]Nimble[/gold] [blue]3[/blue], and Powers gain [gold]Swift[/gold] [blue]3[/blue].
enchantmentForge.flavor: Sponsor item: A practical little forge for cards that already know what they want to become.
ENCHANTMENT_FORGE.flavor: Sponsor item: A practical little forge for cards that already know what they want to become.
basicForge.title: Basic Forger
BASIC_FORGE.title: Basic Forger
basicForge.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue]: gain [gold]Pael's Claw[/gold] or [gold]Nutritious Soup[/gold].
BASIC_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue]: gain [gold]Pael's Claw[/gold] or [gold]Nutritious Soup[/gold].
basicForge.flavor: Sponsor item: The plainest forge only asks whether you want a sharpened claw or another spoonful of soup.
BASIC_FORGE.flavor: Sponsor item: The plainest forge only asks whether you want a sharpened claw or another spoonful of soup.
arcaneForge.title: Arcane Forger
ARCANE_FORGE.title: Arcane Forger
arcaneForge.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck, then choose [blue]1[/blue] valid enchantment for it from [gold]Clone[/gold], [gold]Souls Power[/gold], and [gold]Royally Approved[/gold].
ARCANE_FORGE.description: When obtained, choose [blue]1[/blue] card from your deck, then choose [blue]1[/blue] valid enchantment for it from [gold]Clone[/gold], [gold]Souls Power[/gold], and [gold]Royally Approved[/gold].
arcaneForge.flavor: Sponsor item: The sigils circle the card first, then wait for you to name the spell.
ARCANE_FORGE.flavor: Sponsor item: The sigils circle the card first, then wait for you to name the spell.
arcaneCloneChoiceRelic.title: Clone
ARCANE_CLONE_CHOICE_RELIC.title: Clone
arcaneCloneChoiceRelic.description: Add [gold]Clone[/gold] to the card you just chose.
ARCANE_CLONE_CHOICE_RELIC.description: Add [gold]Clone[/gold] to the card you just chose.

ARCANE_SOULS_POWER_CHOICE_RELIC.title: Souls Power
arcaneSoulsPowerChoiceRelic.description: Add [gold]Souls Power[/gold] to the card you just chose.
ARCANE_SOULS_POWER_CHOICE_RELIC.descript: Add [gold]Souls Power[/gold] to the card you just chose.
arcaneRoyallyApprovedChoiceRelic.title: Royally Approved
arcaneRoyallyApprovedChoiceRelic.descrip: Add [gold]Royally Approved[/gold] to the card you just chose.
ARCANE_ROYALLY_APPROVED_CHOICE_RELIC.des: Add [gold]Royally Approved[/gold] to the card you just chose.
enchantmentMasterRune.title: Enchantment Master
ENCHANTMENT_MASTER_RUNE.title: Enchantment Master
enchantmentMasterRune.description: You can now enchant the same card with multiple effects. Gain [blue]{PrismaticForgeCount}[/blue] random Prismatic enchantment forger and [blue]{GoldForgeCount}[/blue] random Gold enchantment forgers.
ENCHANTMENT_MASTER_RUNE.description: You can now enchant the same card with multiple effects. Gain [blue]{PrismaticForgeCount}[/blue] random Prismatic enchantment forger and [blue]{GoldForgeCount}[/blue] random Gold enchantment forgers.
enchantmentMasterRune.flavor: Sponsor item: A card has enough margin for more than one spell.
ENCHANTMENT_MASTER_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor item: A card has enough margin for more than one spell.
desperateFinaleRune.title: Desperate Finale
DESPERATE_FINALE_RUNE.title: Desperate Finale
desperateFinaleRune.description: Gain [gold]Prophecy Projection[/gold]. Whenever you kill [gold]Final Chorale[/gold], gain [blue]20%[/blue] increased damage, block, and healing, then gain [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Prophecy Projection[/gold]. [gold]Final Chorale[/gold] summoned by a new [gold]Prophecy Projection[/gold] has [blue]300[/blue] more max HP.
DESPERATE_FINALE_RUNE.description: Gain [gold]Prophecy Projection[/gold]. Whenever you kill [gold]Final Chorale[/gold], gain [blue]20%[/blue] increased damage, block, and healing, then gain [blue]1[/blue] additional [gold]Prophecy Projection[/gold]. [gold]Final Chorale[/gold] summoned by a new [gold]Prophecy Projection[/gold] has [blue]300[/blue] more max HP.
desperateFinaleRune.flavor: Sponsor collab item: The finale has not ended; it only pushes the next echo deeper into despair.
DESPERATE_FINALE_RUNE.flavor: Sponsor collab item: The finale has not ended; it only pushes the next echo deeper into despair.
